task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Onboarding Tracker** (Level 8)

Build a customer onboarding tracker. Two tables: Customers (name, company, status) and OnboardingSteps (customer_id, step_name, completed). Steps belong to Customers. Need: full CRUD on customers (auth required on mutations), full CRUD on steps (auth required on mutations), GET /api/customers/onboarding to filter by status='onboarding'.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web and javascript backend

create a Customers table:
  name,
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend
database is local memory

owner is 'admin@test.com'
allow signup and login

create a Customers table:
  name, required
  company, required
  status, default 'onboarding'

create a OnboardingSteps table:
  customer_id, required
  step_name, required
  completed, default false

# Customers endpoints
when user calls POST /api/customers sending customer_data:
  requires login
  validate customer_data:
    name is text, required
    company is text, required
  saved = save customer_data to Customers
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers:
  send back all Customers

when user calls GET /api/customers/onboarding:
  send back all Customers where status is 'onboarding'

when user calls GET /api/customers/:id:
  send back the Customer with this id

when user calls PUT /api/customers/:id sending update_data:
  requires login
  save update_data to Customers
  send back update_data

when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:id:
  requires login
  remove from Customers with this id
  send back 'deleted'

# OnboardingSteps endpoints
when user calls POST /api/customers/:id/steps sending step_data:
  requires login
  validate step_data:
    step_name is text, required
  set step_data's customer_id to this id
  saved = save step_data to OnboardingSteps
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/customers/:id/steps:
  send back all OnboardingSteps where customer_id is this id

when user calls PUT /api/customers/:customer_id/steps/:step_id sending update_data:
  requires login
  save update_data to OnboardingSteps
  send back update_data

when user calls DELETE /api/customers/:customer_id/steps/:step_id:
  requires login
  remove from OnboardingSteps with this step_id
  send back 'deleted'

# Frontend
page 'App' at '/':
  on page load get customers from '/api/customers'
  
  section 'Add Customer' with style app_card:
    'Customer Name' as text input saved as new_name
    'Company' as text input saved as new_company
    button 'Add Customer':
      send {name: new_name, company: new_company} as a new record to '/api/customers'
      get customers from '/api/customers'
      set new_name to ''
      set new_company to ''
  
  section 'Customers' with style app_card:
    heading 'All Customers'
    display customers as table
  
  section 'Onboarding Customers' with style app_card:
    on page load get onboarding from '/api/customers/onboarding'
    heading 'In Onboarding'
    display onboarding as table
